title: Create: Oneblock 2
description: A Minecraft modpack originally created by Shalz and modified by samadc to add more cohesiveness to the experience. I have only added a few mods to make it different, THIS IS NOT MY MODPACK
body:
# Modpack
A Minecraft modpack originally created by [Shalz](https://www.youtube.com/@Shalz) and modified by [samadc]([https://modrinth.com/user/samadc]) to add more cohesiveness to the experience.
THIS IS NOT MY MODPACK!
Original modpack at [https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-oneblock](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-oneblock)
# Support
See [discord](https://discord.gg/zJX8uUnQWS)
# World
A Minecraft map originally made by [IJAminecraft](https://ijaminecraft.com/map/oneblock/), which was adapted for 1.20.1 by [Gamerz_Riot](https://www.youtube.com/@Gamerz_Riot) and then finally modified by [samadc](https://sradcock.com/) for the Create mod
# Creating a oneblock world
[Create_Oneblock.zip (google drive)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VVWzRDAOMN4e-D58AKSs6mh0x9dj2Myv/view?usp=sharing)
[create_Oneblock.zip (github)](https://github.com/Dangerdangerau/Modrinth-mods-modpacks/raw/refs/heads/main/datapacks/Create_OneBlock.zip)

Please Download the Create_OneBlock.zip file, then launch minecraft and create a new world with superflat of just air in the presets box  "minecraft:air".


To add the datapack, go to the the datapacks: 
![Datapacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d4bd4984520f309786adb014f92671a87ea233.png)

And open the pack folder, copy the Create_OneBlock.zip and paste it into the opened folder. OPEN A NEW FILE EXPLORER, DO NOT CHANGE THE FOLDER LOCATION OF THE TEMPOARY FOLDER! 

Ensure you turn off "generate structures"

# Disclaimer
The original datapack and all modifications made to it by IJAMinecraft, Gamerz_Riot, and samadc,  belong wholy to them. I claim ZERO ownership of their brilliant coding abilities.
